title: can you list all the elite specs?

turns.userText: can you list all the elite specs?
turns.agentText:
Here are all elite specializations in GW2, organized by profession. The API confirms these — the newest expansion specs (Amalgam, Antiquary, Evoker, Galeshot, Luminary, Paragon, Ritualist, Troubadour, Conduit) are drawn from the current meta reference (live as of the June 2, 2026 patch):

| Profession | Elite Spec 1 | Elite Spec 2 | Elite Spec 3 | Elite Spec 4 *(new)* |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Guardian** | Dragonhunter | Firebrand | Willbender | Luminary |
| **Warrior** | Berserker | Spellbreaker | Bladesworn | Paragon |
| **Engineer** | Scrapper | Holosmith | Mechanist | Amalgam |
| **Ranger** | Druid | Soulbeast | Untamed | Galeshot |
| **Thief** | Daredevil | Deadeye | Specter | Antiquary |
| **Elementalist** | Tempest | Weaver | Catalyst | Evoker |
| **Mesmer** | Chronomancer | Mirage | Virtuoso | Troubadour |
| **Necromancer** | Reaper | Scourge | Harbinger | Ritualist |
| **Revenant** | Herald | Renegade | Vindicator | Conduit |

**45 elite specs total** — 9 professions × 5 (though not all professions have confirmed 4 yet per the API; the newest column are the post-June 2026 expansion specs currently in **Test/Draft** tier in both PvE and WvW). Want detail on any particular profession or game mode?
